column1: C[august22nd: we are both obviously doing really cool things this saturday

august22nd: i don't know what prozz is, but whatev
august22nd: you are playing the polish guy in person?
saya: well, fast game. He won by a looooot, lol
C[august22nd: oh my gosh, i'm watching Here Comes Honey Boo Boo, I can't believe this is what some of america is like
C[saya: oh my gosh I can't believe you're watching something called here comes honey boo boo
C[august22nd: Danny just looked at the board and said ""Rachel made a B""
saya: remember what I said about chats? and I don't get that
C[august22nd: you made the shape of the letter ""B""
august22nd: yes, I know chat's are public
C[saya: the letter B, i see. I couldn't see it. is it gone now?
C[august22nd: No, it's on the left side of the board
august22nd: it's two eyes, so it's not going anywhere
C[saya: you're online more than i thought. :)
C[saya: I think I need to work on tactics now
matburt: Hope you like the site
matburt: Sorry about the delay, was away eating lunch :)
matburt: Thanks for the feedback, too... we received it
C[august22nd: No problem, I told Rachel more, she said she would pass it to Akita
matburt: oh you are Rachel's friend... gotcha.  How are you liking the site so far?
C[august22nd: The interface is clean and nice, I think it's pretty good
C[august22nd: fyi: I'm headed to a class for an hour or so
matburt: no problem... this game is 24 hrs/turn
matburt: so we've got some time
C[august22nd: The time/turn was unclear to me when I accepted the game.  This game could take a month!
matburt: hah, hopefully we can make it go a little quicker
matburt: the byu yomi time settings might be better
C[august22nd: I'm not complaining that the game is taking too long, I just wasn't sure what was meant by 24h in the time column when I accepted the game.
matburt: yah, when I create these intro open matches I picked the simple time control to make it easier on any beginners who are coming to the site
august22nd: Simple time control is good but the way it was written didn't make it clear that time was per move rather than per game
august22nd: also, ""thinking time"" doesn't mean anything to me
august22nd: I found the wording confusing at the end of the game when it says ""accept removed stones"" I think you should just call them dead stones
matburt: Interesting... okay, thanks for the feedback.
keith.river: that was intended in analyze mode =(
C[anoek: Sorry for timing out over the weekend :(

august22nd: can't you resurrect the game?

august22nd: too bad there is no ""I forgive you, let's play anyway"" button
